---
name: Content or documentation
description: New or updated article, tutorial, or doc
title: "[Content] "
labels: ["content", "documentation"]
assignees: []
---

## Type

- [ ] New article / new module
- [ ] Update to existing content
- [ ] Fix (typo, broken link, outdated info)

## Track (if applicable)

- [ ] Beginner
- [ ] Developer

## Description

What should be added or changed? If it's an update, which file(s)?

## Source / references

If you're adding facts or figures, link to Indigo docs or whitepaper where possible.

## Checklist (for contributors)

- [ ] Content follows the [style guide](https://github.com/gorusys/indigo-hub/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#content-standards--style-guide)
- [ ] No financial advice; disclaimers where needed
- [ ] Links and references are accurate
